description_long: This storage tank is a vertically oriented, cylindrical vessel with a robust, industrial appearance. The main body is composed of a dark, metallic material, with a matte-finished central section and glossy, riveted panels on the sides. The top is capped with a polygonal, dome-like lid featuring bolts and structural reinforcements, while the bottom tapers into a conical section supported by four sturdy legs. Several functional attachments are visible, including a large curved pipe extending from the lower side, multiple access ports, and a prominent valve. The tank's surface shows a mix of smooth and slightly reflective finishes, with some areas appearing more utilitarian and rugged, suitable for urban or industrial environments.
description: A tall, cylindrical metal storage tank with a domed top, conical base, and attached pipes and valves, supported by four legs. The surface features a mix of matte and glossy finishes, with visible industrial details.
description_view_0: The tank's cylindrical body and domed top are prominent, with a smooth matte panel covering most of the visible side and the supporting legs clearly shown.
description_view_1: A large curved pipe attachment is visible extending from the lower right, along with a side panel featuring rivets and a visible access port.
description_view_2: The front face displays multiple access ports and a central valve, with the conical base and all four legs visible.
description_view_3: Another side panel with rivets is visible, along with the curved pipe attachment on the left and additional access ports on the tank's body.
